name: SpongeBob SquarePants
author: irv77
description: Bikini Bottom Map ported to Legacy Console Edition
extended_description:
## ![SpongeBob SquarePants DLC](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LCE-Hub/LCE-Workshop/refs/heads/main/spongebob-squarepants/title.png "advertisement")
Who lives in a pineapple under the sea? Well it's SpongeBob SquarePants, featuring the Bikini Bottom map, and soon included skin pack!—
![Preview Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LCE-Hub/LCE-Workshop/refs/heads/main/spongebob-squarepants/preview.png)

### The Bikini Bottom
- [x] Main Bikini Bottom Map Ported
- [ ] Finish Interiors of Buildings
- [ ] Finalize/Polish Map 

### _Future Skin Pack_
- [ ] _Include Skin Pack Containing Favorite Characters_
